title: Middle Eastern Red Rice Pilaf
description: A flavorful, fragrant, and nourishing pilaf dish made with red rice, perfect for a gluten-free meal.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the red rice and stir to coat with oil and mix with onion and garlic.
Add 2 cups of water, dried rose petals, cumin, and salt.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, until the water is absorbed and the rice is tender.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and garnish with chopped parsley.
